task:
OBJECTIVE: Edit /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/page.tsx

Find the nav element and update its padding from "18px 40px" to "12px 40px".

Find the logo wrapper div gap and set to 0px.

Find the logo_icon.png img and set width and height to 44px, padding to 4px.

Find the Dashboard and Login anchor tags and set their fontSize to 13px, color #8a8a8a, fontWeight 400, fontFamily Inter.

FILES: /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/page.tsx

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
Nav is more compact
Logo gap is 0px
Dashboard and Login are 13px gray Inter
No TypeScript errors

TEST: cd /Users/srini/Projects/kommit; npx tsc --noEmit

DO NOT: change anything else
DO NOT: use ast.parse
